q1: Motor RPM dropped instantly during a full throttle climb.
q2: Airspeed reads 0 knots while the drone is clearly flying at 20 meters per second.
q3: One servo is moving randomly even when the remote control is untouched.
q4: The video feed is cutting out only when I increase the throttle to maximum.
q5: The drone keeps rotating slowly to the left during a stable hover.
q6: Altitude is jumping by 5 meters up and down while on the ground.
q7: The battery percentage dropped from 80% to 10% in just two seconds.
q8: The remote says 'Compass Variance' near the large radio tower.
q9: I lost all GPS satellites immediately after turning on the video transmitter.
q10: The flight controller reboots every time the motors start spinning fast.
q11: The drone is vibrating so hard the camera footage is blurry.
q12: Landing gear is stuck in the 'up' position and pressure is at zero.
q13: The parachute didn't open during the crash test even though the command was sent.
q14: Telemetry link is constantly dropping at ranges over 500 meters.
q15: The motor is very hot to the touch but the other three are cool.
q16: Airspeed and GPS speed show a difference of 40 knots in a no-wind environment.
q17: The drone feels 'mushy' and slow to respond to my stick movements.
q18: One battery cell is at 3.2V while the others are at 4.1V.
q19: The lidar sensor is reporting 0 meters distance in this thick morning fog.
q20: The capacitor on the power board is starting to smoke.
q21: I see a 'D-Term Oscillation' warning in my flight logs.
q22: The ground station screen is frozen but I can still hear the motors.
q23: The drone flipped over immediately upon takeoff.
q24: I cannot arm the drone; it says 'Hardware ID Mismatch'.
q25: The telemetry says I have a 'Low 5V Rail' warning.
